data.name: Full Thrust at Work
data.detailed_description:
Synopsis

A weary office worker, exhausted by the endless pressure of corporate life, is on the verge of quitting. But everything begins to change when he is assigned to mentor a passionate new hire, Noh Maru.

As he guides her through work and reflects on his own forgotten ambitions, he gradually regains his motivation. After leading a major project to success, he earns recognition from his strict boss, Seo Ara, and finds himself growing closer to both women.

Now, standing at a crossroads, he must decide:
Will he stay because of them, or build his own path toward success?

A visual novel romance simulation where you enjoy an engaging office love story, make meaningful choices, and experience multiple endings based on your decisions.

Game Features

  • Story-driven visual novel gameplay

  • Multiple endings depending on your decisions

Controls

  • Mouse Left Click: Next dialogue / Confirm

  • Space Bar: Next dialogue

data.short_description: A story-driven romance visual novel set in the workplace. Guide the protagonist through office life, build relationships with two heroines, and make choices that shape the story. Your decisions lead to multiple endings, from love and career success to unexpected outcomes.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Window 10
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
